title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at AFL Logistics

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at AFL Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the AFL Logistics family as a Fleet Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AFL Logistics:
AFL Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AFL Logistics!
